description_long: This fire hydrant is an unconventional design, featuring a coiled blue hose stacked atop a red, polka-dotted circular base, which itself sits on a gray concrete pedestal. The blue hose is thick and appears to be made of a durable, flexible material, looped in a somewhat haphazard manner. The red base is adorned with white spots, giving it a whimsical, almost decorative appearance, and is wider than the pedestal below. The pedestal is a standard concrete block, providing stability and elevating the hydrant above the ground. The hydrant is positioned next to a corrugated metal wall and a white roll-up garage door, with a small orange bollard and a white cylindrical object nearby. The overall scene suggests an urban or industrial setting, possibly near a service entrance or maintenance area.
description: A whimsical fire hydrant with a coiled blue hose atop a red, polka-dotted base, set on a concrete pedestal beside a metal wall and garage door.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue coiled hose, red polka-dotted base, concrete pedestal, and adjacent orange bollard against a corrugated wall.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the stacked hose and base, with the garage door and two small cylindrical objects visible on the ground.
description_view_2: Rear view mostly obscured, showing the back of the structure with minimal detail of the hydrant itself.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view, partially revealing the blue hose and red base, with the concrete pedestal and bollard visible.
